---
title: "Generative AI Usage Statement"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Generative AI Usage Statement}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```
## Statement of Generative AI Usage

For this milestone, generative AI (Gemini) was utilized to assist with the development of the R package and the associated Shiny application. Specifically, AI was used to:

* Troubleshoot and debug relative path issues, particularly Windows-specific path configurations, when running the Shiny app locally and restructuring the package within the `Submissions` directory.
* Assist with formatting and writing LaTeX code for the project proposal.
* Review testing scripts and check file formatting requirements to ensure proper package structure.
* Help resolve scoping conflicts between global environment objects and package functions during the Shiny app development.

All core statistical logic, Monte Carlo simulations, and final code implementations were independently reviewed, tested, and integrated by the project team.
